name: Tokyo Tekko Co., Ltd.
summary: Tokyo Tekko Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells steel products for the construction industry in Japan and internationally. The company offers high-tensile threaded rebar and joint products that support the construction of high-rise buildings; and High-tensile deformed rebars. Its products include steel bar for concrete reinforcement; threaded rebar joints; mechanical anchorage for threaded rebar and shear reinforcement; mortar-grouted joints; mechanical joints; and rebar processing products. The company was founded in 1939 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
